params.prompt: A blank UI panel for a cozy mobile game, drawn as a page from a magical journal that blends a medieval illuminated storybook with a girl's color-coded notebook. Aged colored paper — warm cream and soft sage with a dusty-rose ribbon bookmark, never pure white, subtle paper grain. Hand-drawn dark-ink rounded frame with tiny vine and leaf doodles in the corners, small washi-tape tabs along the top edge in muted coordinated colors, faint hand-ruled lines inside. Centered flat-lay, soft drop shadow, plain background. No text, no words, no letters. Thick clean outlines, flat muted zen palette, 1930s storybook warmth.
